clauses.statement: resolveScanConclusiveness returns inconclusive for zero scanned applicable targets, not_applicable with a reason for zero scanned inapplicable targets, and defers to the caller (null status) when at least one target was scanned.

When the flow design scanner walks its UI roots and discovers zero files for a UI story, the result status transitions to inconclusive while the FLOW-NO-UI-CODE critical finding is preserved, and it never reports pass.
When the flow design scanner discovers zero files for a non-UI story, the result status transitions to not_applicable with an explicit reason instead of a silent pass.
When at least one UI file is scanned and no findings accumulate, the flow design scanner status remains pass exactly as before, so conclusive repositories see no behavior change.
Every targeted scanner attaches scan_coverage with the scanned count and the roots that were walked, so a pass is auditable against what was actually examined.
When the network contract scanner examines zero candidate files the status transitions to inconclusive, while the existing block verdict for missing routes with candidates present is unchanged.
When the regression risk scanner has zero scored modules to evaluate, the status transitions to inconclusive instead of pass.

inconclusive and not_applicable are rendered distinctly from pass in diagnose summaries and check packs, stating that no scan targets were discovered, and neither status enters the gate DAG unresolved aggregation.

diagrams.title: Scanner status state transitions
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> scanned
  scanned --> pass: targets found, no findings
  scanned --> findings: targets found, findings accumulated
  scanned --> inconclusive: zero targets, scanner applicable
  scanned --> not_applicable: zero targets, scanner not applicable

diagrams.title: Conclusiveness resolution workflow process
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Scan["walk roots / collect targets"] --> Count{"scanned_count"}
  Count -->|> 0| Existing["existing findings-based status"]
  Count -->|0 and applicable| Inc["inconclusive + scan_coverage"]
  Count -->|0 and not applicable| NA["not_applicable + reason"]
  Inc --> Render["summary renders: not a pass"]
  NA --> Render

diagrams.title: Vacuum pass threat and control
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Repo["non-Next.js repository"] --> Scanner["framework-convention scanner"]
  Threat["vacuum pass: zero targets rendered as pass (2026-07-13 incident)"] --> Scanner
  Scanner --> Control["inconclusive vocabulary + scan_coverage audit"]
  Control --> Reader["gate reader sees: nothing was examined"]
